summary: Phase 5e complete. GeminiBackend fully implemented with streaming generateContent, wired into createBackend(), exported from package index. All 10 GeminiBackend tests pass, 99 total orchestrator tests pass, harness validate passes.
learnings: vi.clearAllMocks() in beforeEach clears mock.results — mockRejectedValueOnce on an instance captured before clearAllMocks fires as a no-op. Use the exported __mockGenerateContentStream reference directly for error injection.
GoogleGenerativeAI is constructed inside runTurn() and healthCheck() (not constructor) — required so mockImplementationOnce fires at the correct call site for error tests.
Module-size baseline needed two incremental updates: 65186 → 65313 (gemini.ts) → 65316 (orchestrator.ts import + branch).
The repo-root vitest run includes tests/blueprint/impact-lab.test.ts which was already failing before this phase — not a regression.

WorkflowConfig's agent.backend type union needs 'gemini' to already be present, or TypeScript won't allow the branch without casting. The branch compiled cleanly, so 'gemini' was already in the union.
